summary: Update scripts/export.py to emit four new tables (load_families, load_concept_family_membership with 0/1→BOOLEAN conversion, load_concept_aliases, load_family_aliases) and enrich load_concepts to populate concepts.family_id via WHERE is_primary=1. Bump SCHEMA_VERSION to 3. Update schema/corpus-schema.sql to match (four new CREATE TABLEs with all constraints + ALTER + COMMENT clauses). Producing a working export artifact is the done criterion; guru-web side is coordinated separately based on this artifact. Per design.md §10.
